command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute 
UPDATE lifecycle_services ls
JOIN (
  SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY stageCode ORDER BY sortOrder, id) * 10 AS new_sort
  FROM lifecycle_services
) ranked ON ls.id = ranked.id
SET ls.sortOrder = ranked.new_sort;
